title: Pneumonanthe decora
taxonomy: Pneumonanthe decora is classified within the family Gentianaceae. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. Pneumonanthe decora is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pneumonanthe. The genus Pneumonanthe is part of the order Gentianales. Pneumonanthe decora's classification is also supported by its shared characteristics with other plants in the Gentianaceae family.
uses: Pneumonanthe decora is a flowering plant known for its potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions. benefits: Pneumonanthe decora, also known as the fringe cup, is a plant with potential health benefits. parts: Pneumonanthe decora is known for its medicinal properties, with various parts of the plant being used for treatment purposes.
